CONTENT.Honours: Paris Saint-GermainLigue 1: 2017–18, 2018–19Coupe de France: 2017–18; runner-up: 2018–19Coupe de la Ligue: 2017–18Trophée des Champions: 2018
CONTENT.Club career: Nsoki developed through the Paris Saint-Germain academy. He made his Ligue 1 debut on 20 December 2017 in a match against Caen. He came on for Marquinhos in the 65th minute of a 3–0 home win.On 31 August 2019, Nsoki joined Nice in a transfer worth €12.5 million.Nsoki joined Belgian champions Club Brugge on 24 July 2021, signing a multi-year deal. He made his debut for the club on 1 August, in a 1–0 league victory over Union SG.On 4 August 2022, Nsoki joined Bundesliga outfit TSG Hoffenheim.
CONTENT.External links: France profile at FFFStanley Nsoki – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)
CONTENT.International career: Nsoki was born in France and is of Congolese descent. Nsoki is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Stanley Pierre Nsoki (born 9 April 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender for Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim.
